Part I Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis

During the quarter, supply disruption in Asia resulted in delayed shipments and adversely affected product revenue. The Company incurred expedited freight costs to satisfy customer demand.

Part II Item 1A. Risk Factors

Competition remains intense, with competitors using aggressive pricing and rapid product releases. The Company also continues to depend on suppliers and logistics providers for components and inventory.

Part II Item 2. Unregistered Sales of Equity Securities

None.
